'''parava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moon|moon]]". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moon|moon]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| parava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pærævæth|pærævæth]] || [[word:pærævæj|pærævæj]] || [[word:pærævæsh|pærævæsh]] || [[word:pærævæ|pærævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pararavath|pararavath]] || [[word:pararavaj|pararavaj]] || [[word:pararavash|pararavash]] || [[word:pararava|pararava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:paravath|paravath]] || [[word:paravaj|paravaj]] || [[word:paravash|paravash]] || [[word:parava|parava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:parafvath|parafvath]] || [[word:parafvaj|parafvaj]] || [[word:parafvash|parafvash]] || [[word:parafvaf|parafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:paravatha|paravatha]] || [[word:paravaja|paravaja]] || [[word:paravasha|paravasha]] || [[word:paravaka|paravaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:paravath|paravath]] || [[word:paravaj|paravaj]] || [[word:paravash|paravash]] || [[word:parava|parava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:paravathal|paravathal]] || [[word:paravajal|paravajal]] || [[word:paravashal|paravashal]] || [[word:paravakal|paravakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:paravathatha|paravathatha]] || [[word:paravajaja|paravajaja]] || [[word:paravashasha|paravashasha]] || [[word:paravaka|paravaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:paravathan|paravathan]] || [[word:paravajan|paravajan]] || [[word:paravashan|paravashan]] || [[word:paravakan|paravakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:paravathaoro|paravathaoro]] || [[word:paravajaoro|paravajaoro]] || [[word:paravashaoro|paravashaoro]] || [[word:paravakaoro|paravakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
